quince-puree-tart-lezzet.name: Quince Puree Tart
instructions: 1. Mix the necessary materials for dough in a wide container.
2. Wrap a piece of egg size from the dough and wrap it into the stretch foil and leave it in the refrigerator for 30 minutes.
3. Open the remaining dough with the roller on the unified countertop and place it into the weighing mold you lubricate and flour.
4. Open holes on the cutlery and cook for 30 minutes in the oven set to 180 degrees.
5. Reject the shells of the corners.
6. Take a large pot and add sugar and milk on it.
7. Cook until softened in medium fire.
8. Add and mix the vanilla and vanilla.
9. Leave to cool.
10. Open the dough roller in the refrigerator and cut fine strips.
11. 11. Transfer the lunar porridge you prepared into the weighing you extract from the oven.
12. Place the dough strips on the foam and again put it in the oven.
12. August Cook until you're angry.
14 July Serve.
15.  Afiyet olsun.
16. Remember to visit our page for Cherry tart recipe.

quinoa-with-walnuts-and-shallots.name: Quinoa With Walnuts And Shallots
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast walnuts on a small rimmed baking sheet, stirring occasionally, until fragrant and slightly darkened in color, 6–8 minutes. Let cool; coarsely chop.
Meanwhile, thoroughly rinse quinoa; drain.
Heat oil in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Add shallots and ½ tsp. salt; stir to coat.

Cook, stirring occasionally, until shallots have softened, about 5 minutes. Add quinoa and stir to coat. Pour in 1½ cups water, increase the heat, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cover. Cook until quinoa is tender and the germ has unfurled, 15–18 minutes. Season with salt. Just before serving, toss in toasted walnuts. Reserve ½ cup quinoa for Quinoa and Roasted Vegetable Salad.
